products.title: Anti Skid Mat
features: Safeguard cutlery from sliding out with these Anti skid mats.
Ideal for kitchen drawers, cabinet/ wardrobe shelves, working table, etc.
Dotted and lined upper surface for better hold and superior anti skid coating at the bottom.
For use in kitchen drawers and shelves - protects furniture from water dripping and the anti skid feature keeps the cutlery and utensils in place.
For use in wardrobe and shelves - protects clothes from wood coating stain.
Easy to clean and reuse.
Available in various finish.
Comes in rolls, each of which are 510 mm wide x 5 meters long.

  • PVC corner 90° for PVC skirting
  • Available in 100mm and 150mm heights.
  • Finish : Black, Glossy Black, Anthracite, Brushed Steel, Silver, Glossy White, GlossyChrome,Grey
Straight Joint
  • To connect two straight skirting's.
  • Available in 100mm and 150mm heights.
  • Finish : Black, Glossy Black, Anthracite, Brushed Steel, Silver, Glossy White, GlossyChrome,Grey
Flexi joint
  • Flexible joints for different angles from 90° to 270°.
  • Available in 100mm and 150mm heights.
  • Finish : Black, Brushed Steel, Silver
End joint
  • End joints for PVC skirting
  • Available in 80,100,150mm heights.
